title: Helensburgh
description: The official modpack for Helensburgh! Download and join today!
body:
## Helensburgh
Welcome to Helensburgh! This modpack contains all the official mods for the Helensburgh server. Download and join today!

## Have a potato PC?
Check out [Helensburgh Lite](https://modrinth/modpack/helensburgh-lite)

## Join our discord community!
[Discord](https://discord.gg/K77C2jXhcY)


## Mods
- Automobility by FoundationGames 0.4.2+1.19.2-fabric
  
- Chat Heads by dzwdz 0.10.31
  
- Chat Signing Hider by henkelmax fabric-1.19.2-1.0.5
  
- Collective by Serilum 1.19.2-7.30-fabric+forge
  
- Construction by PlayTics 1.0
  
- CorgiLib by CorgiTaco 1.19.2-1.0.0.34-fabric
  
- ItemPhysic Lite by creativemd 2.9.4
  
- Fabric API by modmuss50 0.77.0+1.19.2
  
- FlightAssistant by Octol1ttle 1.0.2
  
- Forge Config API Port by Fuzs 4.2.11
  
- Geckolib by Gecko 3.1.40
  
- ItemPhysic by creativemd 1.6.6
  
- Joban Client Mod by LX86 1.19.2-1.2.2
  
- Lightman's Currency by Lightman fabric-1.19.2-1.0.2.2a
  
- MTR London Underground Addon by tinblue 1.19.2-2.1.0
  
- MTR Sign Addon by MarcusIsLion 0.9
  
- MTR Utility by Yume2015 1.19.2-1.0.0
  
- Minecraft Transit Railway by jonafanho FABRIC-1.19.2-3.2.2-hotfix-1
  
- Nemo's Transit Expansion by Zbx1425 0.4.2+1.19.2
  
- Paladin's Furniture Mod by unlikepaladin 1.19.x-v1.2-fabric
  
- Realistic Cities by ixion 0.4
  
- Station Decoration by AIDA64S 1.19.2-3.2.2-1.3.4-enhancement-1
  
- Xaero's Minimap by thexaero 23.9.7_Fabric_1.19.1
  
- Xaero's World Map by thexaero 1.37.8_Fabric_1.19.1
  
- aftersans53228's fabric road by aftersans53228 1.0.2
  
- britishrail 1.19.2-0.1.2-1

- oωo (owo-lib) by unknown
